security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com
